name: My employer has no insurance—can I still get benefits in Boise?

mainEntity.name: My employer has no insurance—can I still get benefits in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, file Uninsured Employers claim with Idaho Industrial Commission; they pursue employer.[3] Utah similar via Labor Commission.[2] Key factors: Prove no coverage, employer pays or fund covers. Practical guidance: Report to commission immediately; they notify employer, enforce insurance.
